text: Excellent introduction for the basic understanding of the Machine Learning . Very good , structured , easy to follow and understand course for anyone whose has previous exposure to linear algebra using MATLAB and Octave . The mentors appear to be very active and hence should not be trouble for anyone without very strong background ( read prerequisite like Linear Algebra especially for the assignments ) . The Assignments are self explanatory enough that I did all of them in just 2 - 3 weeks , thanks to my 2 - 3 years of coding in MATLAB and linear algebra . Thanks very much Prof . Ng and the team !
